description_long: This object is a black revolver-style handgun with a long barrel and a robust, solid frame. The grip is ergonomically contoured, likely made of a polymer or rubberized material, and features a smooth, matte finish for secure handling. The cylinder is prominent and appears to be capable of holding six rounds, with visible fluting for weight reduction and style. The trigger guard is rounded and thick, providing ample space for finger placement and protection. The barrel is extended and unadorned, with a front sight post visible at the muzzle end. The overall construction suggests a durable, high-quality firearm suitable for law enforcement or civilian use in urban environments.
description: A black revolver handgun with a long barrel, ergonomic grip, and robust frame, featuring a smooth matte finish and prominent cylinder.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, ergonomic grip, and detailed cylinder.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, front sight post, and the circular opening of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip contour, cylinder, and barrel profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the rear sight alignment.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with ergonomic shaping to fit the hand comfortably, featuring a smooth, matte surface that appears to be made of polymer or rubber. There are subtle finger grooves for improved handling, and the backstrap is slightly curved for palm support. The grip lacks visible checkering or stippling but is designed for a secure hold. No logos or embellishments are visible, giving it a utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rounded, with a thick profile that provides ample protection for the trigger. It is smoothly integrated into the frame, with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, prioritizing safety and ease of access.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and straight, with a standard profile and no visible threading, porting, or compensator attachments. It has a smooth exterior finish and a front sight post at the muzzle. There are no visible markings or fluting on the barrel, emphasizing a clean and classic revolver design.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or barrel exterior. The surface is plain and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations apparent in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this handgun does not feature a traditional magazine base or floorplate. The base of the grip is rounded and smooth, with no extensions, flares, or finger rests, and lacks any visible logos or texturing.
